heading: Official mail matter
label: 282d Official mail matter
text: The Legislative Counsel may send the official mail matter of the Office as franked mail under .section 3210 of title 39
notes: Amendments1971— substituted provision for Legislative Counsel to send official mail matter of the Office as franked mail under , for former provision granting the Office the same privilege of free transmission of official mail matter as other offices of the United States Government.Pub. L. 92–51section 3210 of title 39
